payload.body: Run 006 (Gemini 2.5 Flash, 29/30 trials — one transient missing). Headline matches 005: vanilla 9/15 (60%) ship, trust 0/14 (0%) ship. Three vendors (Anthropic Haiku, OpenAI 4o, Google 2.5-flash) and two capability tiers (small/fast and frontier) all confirm: 60% baseline error rate; 100% bug-ship reduction under #![strict]. Notable wrinkle: 13-numeric trust trials had bug regex miss (Gemini used try_into for the danger spot) but Trust still caught an as u64 cast elsewhere — partial-knowledge model + Trust safety net = clean result.
